author: Sergey Pekarchik
item.compactmod.paperblock.desc1: Drops paper when the block falls
item.compactmod.paperblock.desc2: Burns into a Burnt Paper Block, but may burn away entirely
item.compactmod.paperblock.desc3: If not burning, the Burnt Paper Block attracts creepers within 70 blocks
item.compactmod.paperblock.desc4: Bees flee from the Burnt Paper Block within a 50-block radius
item.compactmod.paperblock.desc5: Nothing drops when a Burnt Paper Block is broken
item.compactmod.burnt_paper_block.desc1: Created by burning a Paper Block
item.compactmod.burnt_paper_block.desc2: If not on fire, attracts creepers within 70 blocks
item.compactmod.burnt_paper_block.desc3: Bees flee the area within a 50-block radius
item.compactmod.burnt_paper_block.desc4: No items drop when the block is broken
item.compactmod.burnt_paper_block.desc5: Cannot be harvested, even with Silk Touch tools
